nodes.name: InitializeLinearGaussianStateModel
nodes.description: Create the immutable linear-Gaussian state-space model with latent mean and covariance plus fixed system/noise matrices.

inputs.name: initial_covariance
inputs.constraints: Compile-time shape N x N; symmetric positive semi-definite

inputs.name: process_noise
inputs.constraints: Compile-time shape N x N; symmetric positive semi-definite

inputs.name: measurement_noise
inputs.constraints: Compile-time shape M x M; symmetric positive semi-definite

outputs.name: state_model
outputs.type_desc: StateModelSpec{x, P, F, Q, H, R}

nodes.type_signature: (initial_state: SVector<T, N>, initial_covariance: SMatrix<T, N, N>, transition_matrix: SMatrix<T, N, N>, process_noise: SMatrix<T, N, N>, observation_matrix: SMatrix<T, M, N>, measurement_noise: SMatrix<T, M, M>) -> StateModelSpec{x: SVector<T, N>, P: SMatrix<T, N, N>, F: SMatrix<T, N, N>, Q: SMatrix<T, N, N>, H: SMatrix<T, M, N>, R: SMatrix<T, M, M>}
nodes.conceptual_summary: Immutable Linear-Gaussian Dynamical System Specification. Binds an initial latent mean vector and covariance matrix with linear evolution and linear projection operators, plus additive noise covariances, into a single formal model specification. The operation does not propagate or update state; it only maps raw numerical tensors into an immutable typed object that encodes first-order Markov and Gaussian assumptions for later recursive estimation.. Applications: Multisensor robot pose tracking with uncertain motion and observation channels, Neural time-series latent trajectory decoding from noisy electrode measurements, Geophysical data assimilation for evolving spatial fields with partial observations, Industrial process digital twins for hidden system-state monitoring and anomaly detection

nodes.name: PredictLatentState
nodes.description: Apply the linear-Gaussian predict transition kernel to propagate latent mean/covariance forward in time.

inputs.name: state_model
inputs.type_desc: StateModelSpec{x, P, F, Q, H, R}

outputs.name: predicted_state_model
outputs.type_desc: StateModelSpec{x_pred, P_pred, F, Q, H, R}
outputs.constraints: New object with updated x and P only

nodes.type_signature: (state_model: StateModelSpec{x, P, F, Q, H, R}) -> StateModelSpec{x_pred, P_pred, F, Q, H, R}
nodes.conceptual_summary: Linear-Gaussian State Moment Propagation. Maps a hidden state distribution one discrete step forward using a linear transition operator and additive noise. The mean is transformed as x_pred = F x, and the covariance is transformed as P_pred = F P F^T + Q, while non-updated model components are passed through unchanged. This is the prediction half of a recursive estimator that propagates first- and second-order moments under a first-order Markov assumption.. Applications: Forecasting hidden kinematic variables in autonomous motion estimation from noisy inertial streams., Propagating unobserved compartment intensities in stochastic population-dynamics monitoring between measurement times., Predicting internal thermofluid process states in industrial control loops before new sensor assimilation., Tracking latent neural population activity trajectories in brain-signal decoding pipelines.

nodes.name: UpdateWithMeasurement
nodes.description: Apply the linear-Gaussian recursive update kernel to incorporate a measurement and produce posterior latent mean/covariance.

inputs.name: predicted_state_model
inputs.type_desc: StateModelSpec{x_pred, P_pred, F, Q, H, R}

inputs.name: measurement
inputs.constraints: Compile-time dimension M; compatible with H and R

outputs.name: posterior_state_model
outputs.type_desc: StateModelSpec{x_post, P_post, F, Q, H, R}
outputs.constraints: New object; analytical Bayesian posterior update

nodes.type_signature: (predicted_state_model: StateModelSpec{x_pred: SVector<T, N>, P_pred: SMatrix<T, N, N>, F, Q, H, R}, measurement: SVector<T, M>) -> StateModelSpec{x_post: SVector<T, N>, P_post: SMatrix<T, N, N>, F, Q, H, R}
nodes.conceptual_summary: Linear-Gaussian Belief Conditioning Step. Combines a predicted multivariate Gaussian latent estimate with a new observation vector through a linear observation operator and additive Gaussian noise model. It computes a measurement residual term, weights that measurement residual by a precision-weighted blending factor, and produces an analytically updated latent mean and covariance. The result is a posterior estimate that balances prior dynamics with new evidence in minimum-variance closed form under linear-Gaussian assumptions.. Applications: Assimilating sparse remote-sensing observations into geophysical field-state estimates in environmental simulation., Updating latent neural population dynamics from partial electrode readouts in computational neuroscience., Correcting internal electrochemical state estimates from voltage/current observations in energy-storage management., Conditioning compartmental latent dynamics using delayed incidence observations in epidemiological inference.

nodes.name: ExposeLatentMean
nodes.description: Read out the current latent state mean estimate from immutable filter state.

inputs.name: current_state_model
inputs.type_desc: StateModelSpec{x, P, F, Q, H, R}
inputs.constraints: Can be initialized, predicted, or updated state

nodes.type_signature: (current_state_model: StateModelSpec{x, P, F, Q, H, R}) -> SVector<T, N>
nodes.conceptual_summary: Latent State Mean Projection. Extracts the central tendency vector from a composite latent-state specification without modifying any component of that specification. The operation is a direct structural projection from a state tuple to its mean element, preserving dimensionality and numeric values exactly.. Applications: Mobile autonomy: expose the current pose/velocity latent estimate from a probabilistic motion-state container for downstream planning., Neuroscience signal inference: read the inferred hidden neural activity mean from a state-space estimator at each timestep., Atmospheric or oceanic data assimilation: retrieve the current analyzed latent field mean from a sequential estimator state., Industrial process monitoring: extract current hidden process-condition mean from a dynamical estimator for control logic.

nodes.name: ExposeCovariance
nodes.description: Read out the current latent covariance estimate from immutable filter state.

inputs.name: current_state_model
inputs.type_desc: StateModelSpec{x, P, F, Q, H, R}
inputs.constraints: Can be initialized, predicted, or updated state

outputs.name: state_covariance
outputs.constraints: Compile-time shape N x N; symmetric positive semi-definite

nodes.type_signature: (current_state_model: StateModelSpec{x, P, F, Q, H, R}) -> SMatrix<T, N, N>
nodes.conceptual_summary: Latent Uncertainty Matrix Projection. Selects and returns the second-order uncertainty component from an immutable estimator-state tuple without altering any state variables. The operation is an identity-level projection from a composite structured object to its covariance substructure, preserving matrix values and topology. The result is the current symmetric positive semi-definite pairwise uncertainty representation over latent dimensions.. Applications: Robot localization pipelines extracting current pose-uncertainty structure for motion-planning risk bounds, Atmospheric data assimilation systems exposing uncertainty coupling between latent grid variables, Neural signal decoding frameworks retrieving latent-state uncertainty for adaptive stimulation control, Manufacturing process monitoring engines reading uncertainty matrices to trigger tolerance-aware interventions
